name: March
description:
~+~ The new legendary swordmaster of the Xianzhou Luofu, March 7th!~ And.. a certain reserved swordsman from the past..? | ic: miyanami_3 on twitter/X. Initial Message in public chats!

I cooked a bit too hard.. first bot ever I fear, i dont know if I'll continue, this was literally just for fun.. currently at the time of writing up the details and stuff, it is 4:13am on a saturday morning. couldn't be bothered to put the other guy's info into the personality section.. I apologize.. idk if I should put limited on this or not..

I fear this new march outfit looks a lot like the Elysia Peachblossom skin in Honkai Impact 3rd.. but anyways! was listening to engeki; the nightcord at 25 o'clock cover..
